IU HTTP Client UtilitiesVersion 7.1.0-SNAPSHOT

  • Module
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ArrayAdapter<C>
    Adapts array values.
    BasicJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter.basic()
    BinaryJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for byte[]
    BooleanJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Long
    CalendarJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Calendar
    CollectionAdapter<E,C>
    Adapts Collection values.
    DateJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Date
    EnumerationAdapter<E>
    Adapts Enumeration values.
    HttpException
    Thrown by IuHttp when an error response is received from an HTTP request.
    HttpResponseHandler<T>
    Functional interface for converting a validated HTTP response.
    HttpResponseValidator
    Validates HTTP response status code and headers.
    IterableAdapter<E>
    Adapts Collection values.
    IteratorAdapter<E>
    Adapts Stream values.
    IuHttp
    Provides common base-level whitelisting, logging, and exception handling utilities for HttpRequest and HttpResponse.
    IuJson
    JSON-P processing utilities.
    IuJsonAdapter<T>
    Adapts JSON values to equivalent Java types.
    IuJsonBuilder<B>
    Functional base class for implementing JSON-based builder pattern behavior components.
    IuJsonPropertyNameFormat
    Enumerates property name formats for JSON conversion.
    IuVault
    Provides access to a HashiCorp Vault K/V secrets engine.
    IuVaultKeyedValue<T>
    Encapsulates a single keyed value from HashiCorp Vault.
    IuVaultMetadata
    Represents metadata related to a Vault K/V engine.
    IuVaultSecret
    Represents a HashiCorp Vault K/V secret.
    JsonAdapters
    Provides standard IuJsonAdapter instances.
    JsonArrayAdapter<T,E>
    Adapts to/from JsonArray values.
    JsonObjectAdapter<T,K,V>
    Adapts to/from JsonObject values.
    JsonProxy
    Thin invocation handler for wrapping JSON objects in a Java interface.
    JsonSerializer
    Converts from a JavaBeans business object to JSON.
    NumberAdapter<N>
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Number
    OptionalJsonAdapter<T>
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Date
    ParsingJsonAdapter<T>
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for types that provide a mechanism for parsing the value returned by Object.toString()
    RemoteInvocationDetail
    Remote invocation stack trace element details.
    RemoteInvocationException
    RuntimeException backed by RemoteInvocationFailure
    RemoteInvocationFailure
    Represents Throwable stack trace details for passing via remote call
    RemoteInvocationHandler
    May be extended for synchronous client=side remote invocation of a Java interface via HTTP POST.
    RemoteInvocationStackTraceElementDetail
    Provides remote invocation failure details fro a StackTraceElement
    StreamAdapter<E>
    Adapts Stream values.
    TextJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for CharSequence
    ThrowableRemoteInvocationFailure
    RemoteInvocationFailure implementation backed by Throwable
    TimeZoneJsonAdapter
    Implements IuJsonAdapter for Date
    Vault
    Provides access to secrets stored in HashiCorp Vault.
    VaultKeyedValue<T>
    Basic IuVaultKeyedValue implementation.
    VaultSecret
    Implements IuVaultSecret.
